name: mcp-state-connections
description: DEFERRED: Connection state management deferred with db.connect. Original: Add connection state to MCP state.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: activeConnections: Map<string, SQL> added for named database connections
getConnection(name?: string) returns connection by name or default
setConnection(name, sql) stores connection in map
closeConnection(name) closes and removes connection from map
closeAllConnections() cleanup function for server shutdown
Default connection name is 'default' when name not specified
Connection state isolated from existing schema/store state
